raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A review of this section centrally includes assessing whether the thesis, gap, and contribution claim are framed appropriately.","R1.2":"The section makes a multi-step argument from benchmark limitations to RoboJudge design, empirical results, and a recommended default protocol.","R1.3":"The empirical claims and final recommendation depend on whether the reported correlations and comparisons support the stated conclusions.","R1.5":"Reviewing a paper section includes checking whether the ordering and narrative arc from motivation to method to results to implication work at section level.","R1.6":"A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.","RX.1":"The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks methodological or contextual detail needed for firm judgments.","RX.2":"The section contains strong claims about replacing default evaluation protocols, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The delegation is only to review the section, so the response must stay within that review scope rather than executing edits or broader research work.","RX.4":"Because evaluation protocols can affect downstream robotics benchmarking decisions, the review should avoid endorsing unsupported or harmful extrapolations.","RX.5":"Review comments should remain traceable to specific statements and evidence presented in the section."}}

rationale.R1.1: A review of this section centrally includes assessing whether the thesis, gap, and contribution claim are framed appropriately.
rationale.R1.2: The section makes a multi-step argument from benchmark limitations to RoboJudge design, empirical results, and a recommended default protocol.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical claims and final recommendation depend on whether the reported correlations and comparisons support the stated conclusions.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a paper section includes checking whether the ordering and narrative arc from motivation to method to results to implication work at section level.
rationale.R1.6: A section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks methodological or contextual detail needed for firm judgments.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong claims about replacing default evaluation protocols, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is only to review the section, so the response must stay within that review scope rather than executing edits or broader research work.
rationale.RX.4: Because evaluation protocols can affect downstream robotics benchmarking decisions, the review should avoid endorsing unsupported or harmful extrapolations.
rationale.RX.5: Review comments should remain traceable to specific statements and evidence presented in the section.
